subject: [PATCH v2 04/10] nfsd: initialize copy-notify stateid before publishing it

2026-07-09.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the NFS server where the copy-notify stateid was being published before it was fully initialized, leading to potential use-after-free errors. The fix involves initializing the cpntf state and publishing it in nfs4_alloc_init_cpntf_state() before returning it with an extra reference. This ensures that the caller can safely read and write the stateid without risking a free operation on the same entry.
